PreToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" guard || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping guard'
PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous shell commands before execution

PostToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" polish || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping polish'
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format and type-check after file edits

PostToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" polish || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping polish'
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format and type-check after file writes

PostToolUse.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" observe || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping observe'
PostToolUse.description: Record multi-dimensional tool usage observations (async, non-blocking)

SessionEnd.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" reflect || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found, skipping reflect'
SessionEnd.description: Analyze session observations and evolve skills at session end
